creator: littlesavage@rambler.ru
text:
Hi,

On 06.10.2013 17:03, Guido Falsi wrote:
> I made further changes to the port to bring it up to date with the
> latest ports tree news:
> - USES=scons
> - New LIB_DEPENDS format
> - Support staging
> Can you test it and approve the attached patch?
> Thank you!

Approved
